system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

vertices

);

blocks
(

    hex (16 17 18 19 20 21 22 23) (10 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (24 25 26 27 28 29 30 31) (60 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {

        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }

    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (25 26 30 29)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 2 6 7)
            (19 18 22 23)
            (27 26 30 31)
        );

        (
            (0 1 5 4)
            (8 9 13 12)

        faces

            (4 5 6 7)

);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-03;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>
<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Unknown laminarModel type generalizedNewtonian

Valid laminarModel types:

6
(
Giesekus
Maxwell
PTT
Stokes
generalisedNewtonian
lambdaThixotropic
)


    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::laminarModel<BasicMomentumTransportModel> > Foam::laminarModel<BasicMomentumTransportModel>::New(const alphaField&, const rhoField&, const Foam::volVectorField&, const Foam::surfaceScalarField&, const Foam::surfaceScalarField&, const Foam::viscosity&) [with BasicMomentumTransportModel = Foam::incompressibleMomentumTransportModel; alphaField = Foam::geometricOneField; rhoField = Foam::geometricOneField; Foam::volVectorField = Foam::GeometricField<Foam::Vector<double>, Foam::fvPatchField, Foam::volMesh>; Foam::surfaceScalarField = Foam::GeometricField<double, Foam::fvsPatchField, Foam::surfaceMesh>]
    in file ../momentumTransportModels/lnInclude/laminarModel.C at line 117.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error message is clear:

```
Unknown laminarModel type generalizedNewtonian

Valid laminarModel types:
(
Giesekus
Maxwell
PTT
Stokes
generalisedNewtonian
lambdaThixotropic
)
```

The issue is a **spelling mismatch**. The OpenFOAM version being used expects `generalisedNewtonian` (British English spelling with an 's'), but the `momentumTransport` file specifies `generalizedNewtonian` (American English spelling with a 'z'). This is a common issue when tutorials from different regions or versions use inconsistent spellings.

## Proposed Solution

**In the file `constant/momentumTransport`**, change the `laminarModel` entry from:

```
laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;
```

to:

```
laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;
```

This is the only change needed. Everything else in the configuration — including the `CrossPowerLaw` viscosity model with `nuInf=10`, `m=0.4`, `n=3`, the PIMPLE settings, boundary conditions, mesh definition, and the rest of the setup — should remain unchanged since they already align with the user requirements.

## Additional Note

There is also a potential secondary issue to be aware of: the `physicalProperties` file sets `nu` to `1e-03` (a constant viscosity), while the `momentumTransport` file uses a `CrossPowerLaw` model which computes its own effective viscosity (`nuEff`). These two should be consistent. Since the user requirement says "use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03", keeping `nu` as `1e-03` in `physicalProperties` is correct. However, if the `CrossPowerLaw` model requires additional coefficients beyond just `nuInf`, `m`, and `n`, those may need to be added to the `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` sub-dictionary. Check the OpenFOAM documentation for your version to see what coefficients the `CrossPowerLaw` model expects (typically it needs `tauStar` or equivalent). But the primary fix is correcting the spelling of `generalisedNewtonian`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'constant/momentumTransport', 'changes': 'Change laminarModel from generalizedNewtonian to generalisedNewtonian'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
